mapper.sql: id, project_id AS projectId, project_name AS projectName, organ_id AS organId, organ_name AS organName, permission_type AS permissionType, permission_status AS permissionStatus, template_id AS templateId, resource_ids AS resourceIds, grant_date AS grantDate, expire_date AS expireDate, grant_user_id AS grantUserId, grant_user_name AS grantUserName, revoke_user_id AS revokeUserId, revoke_user_name AS revokeUserName, remark, create_date AS createDate, update_date AS updateDate
mapper.select: SELECT FROM project_permission WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO project_permission (project_id, project_name, organ_id, organ_name, permission_type, permission_status, template_id, resource_ids, grant_date, expire_date, grant_user_id, grant_user_name, remark, create_date, update_date) VALUES (#{projectId}, #{projectName}, #{organId}, #{organName}, #{permissionType}, #{permissionStatus}, #{templateId}, #{resourceIds}, #{grantDate}, #{expireDate}, #{grantUserId}, #{grantUserName}, #{remark}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update:
UPDATE project_permission
project_id = #{projectId}, project_name = #{projectName}, organ_id = #{organId}, organ_name = #{organName}, permission_type = #{permissionType}, permission_status = #{permissionStatus}, template_id = #{templateId}, resource_ids = #{resourceIds}, expire_date = #{expireDate}, remark = #{remark}, update_date = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0
UPDATE project_permission SET permission_status = 3, revoke_user_id = #{userId}, revoke_user_name = #{userName}, update_date = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0

UPDATE project_permission SET permission_status = 3, revoke_user_id = #{userId}, revoke_user_name = #{userName}, update_date = NOW() WHERE is_del = 0 AND id IN
#{item}
UPDATE project_permission SET permission_status = 1, grant_date = NOW(), grant_user_id = #{userId}, grant_user_name = #{userName}, update_date = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0
mapper.select: SELECT project_name FROM data_project WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND is_del = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT organ_name FROM sys_organ WHERE organ_id = #{organId} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, template_name AS templateName, template_desc AS templateDesc, permissions, create_date AS createDate FROM project_permission_template WHERE is_del = 0 ORDER BY create_date DESC
SELECT id, template_name AS templateName, template_desc AS templateDesc, permissions, create_date AS createDate FROM project_permission_template WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO project_permission_template (template_name, template_desc, permissions, create_user_id, create_date, update_date) VALUES (#{templateName}, #{templateDesc}, #{permissions}, #{createUserId}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update:
UPDATE project_permission_template
template_name = #{templateName}, template_desc = #{templateDesc}, permissions = #{permissions}, update_date = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0
UPDATE project_permission_template SET is_del = 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0
